title: Imagineart Golden Hour Beauty Editorial Portrait AI
sourceTitle: Imagineart Golden Hour Beauty Editorial Portrait AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Ultra-realistic close-up beauty portrait of stunning adult woman with luminous fair skin and delicate facial features, styled with long naturally voluminous dark brown wavy-curly hair parted in the center and refined fashion-magazine elegance. Subject: stunning adult woman with luminous fair skin and delicate facial features has luminous fair skin, soft natural blush, subtle freckles, hazel-green eyes with realistic catchlights, long eyelashes, defined eyebrows, soft glossy lips, delicate facial features, and elegant calm expression with soft romantic mood. Scene: Creamy beige luxury minimal background keeps the portrait refined, romantic, shallow-depth, and focused on hair texture, skin detail, and jewelry. Composition: Close-up DSLR portrait with 85mm f/1.4 look, balanced face framing, center-parted voluminous hair surrounding the face, flowing ivory-white textured dress with modest neckline and intricate traditional gold jhumka earrings visible as elegant styling detail, and sophisticated negative space. Signature Elements: Preserved imagineart golden hour beauty editorial portrait source structure, fixed composition hierarchy, stable visual rhythm, and reusable content controls remain consistent across generated variants. Style: Preserve the source visual style, rendering finish, and production polish. Color Palette: Creamy beige background, ivory-white dress texture, warm gold jewelry, luminous fair skin, dark brown hair, hazel-green eyes, soft pink lips, and golden-hour warmth. Lighting: Warm golden-hour lighting mixed with soft on-camera flash, dreamy glow, gentle skin highlights, realistic catchlights, shallow depth separation, and soft romantic contrast. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。

Scene: Creamy beige luxury minimal background keeps the portrait refined, romantic, shallow-depth, and focused on hair texture, skin detail, and jewelry. Composition: Close-up DSLR portrait with 85mm f/1.4 look, balanced face framing, center-parted voluminous hair surrounding the face, flowing ivory-white textured dress with modest neckline and intricate traditional gold jhumka earrings visible as elegant styling detail, and sophisticated negative space. Signature Elements: Preserved imagineart golden hour beauty editorial portrait source structure, fixed composition hierarchy, stable visual rhythm, and reusable content controls remain consistent across generated variants. Style: Preserve the source visual style, rendering finish, and production polish. Color Palette: Creamy beige background, ivory-white dress texture, warm gold jewelry, luminous fair skin, dark brown hair, hazel-green eyes, soft pink lips, and golden-hour warmth. Lighting: Warm golden-hour lighting mixed with soft on-camera flash, dreamy glow, gentle skin highlights, realistic catchlights, shallow depth separation, and soft romantic contrast. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.
